approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-009 — Implement reviewed live apply executor
goal: Implement an explicitly approved live managed-region executor bound to target alias, expected revision, typed operations, snapshots, postflight and restore.

acceptance.assertion: Live execution requires a reviewed receipt and explicit allowlisted local target alias.
Only the declared managed region and expected revision can be mutated.
After-state, idempotency and semantic verification are mandatory.
A tested restore path and kill switch exist before productive use.
